spec.title: 🔍 Domains Scanned
spec.description: Total number of domains scanned in the selected time range

spec.query:
from(bucket: "AI")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "domain_threats")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "blocked")
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> sum(column: "_value")

spec.title: 📡 OTX Pulse Activity Over Time
spec.description: AlienVault OTX pulse activity over time — spikes indicate coordinated threat campaigns

spec.query:
from(bucket: "AI")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "domain_threats")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "pulses")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_value"] > 0)
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "Pulse Activity")

from(bucket: "AI")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "domain_threats")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "blocked" and (r["_value"] == true or r["_value"] == "true"))
  |> group()
  |> count()

spec.title: 📋 Threat Intelligence Log
spec.description: Full threat intelligence log — all scanned domains with their metadata

spec.query:
from(bucket: "AI")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "domain_threats")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => not (r["domain"] == "isabellepotel.fr" and r["_time"] >= 2026-05-03T02:55:05Z and r["_time"] <= 2026-05-03T02:55:20Z))
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time", "domain"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "domain", "blocked", "pulses", "vt_detections"])

spec.title: ⚠️ Threat Rate
spec.description: Percentage of scanned domains identified as threats

spec.query:
total = from(bucket: "AI")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "domain_threats")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "blocked")
  |> group()
  |> count()

blocked = from(bucket: "AI")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "domain_threats")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "blocked")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_value"] == true)
  |> group()
  |> count()

join(tables: {total: total, blocked: blocked}, on: ["_stop"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value: float(v: r._value_blocked) / float(v: r._value_total) * 100.0}))

spec.title: 🦠 Max VT Score
spec.description: Highest VirusTotal detection score seen in this period

spec.query:
from(bucket: "AI")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "domain_threats")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "vt_detections")
  |> max()
  |> group()
  |> max(column: "_value")

spec.title: 📈 Blocked vs. Scanned Over Time
spec.description: Threats blocked vs. total domains scanned over time

spec.query:
from(bucket: "AI")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "domain_threats")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "blocked" and (r["_value"] == true or r["_value"] == "true"))
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count, createEmpty: true)
  |> yield(name: "Blocked Threats")

from(bucket: "AI")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "domain_threats")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "blocked")
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count, createEmpty: true)
  |> yield(name: "Total Scanned")

spec.title: 🎯 Top 10 Most Malicious Domains
spec.description: Top 10 most detected domains by VirusTotal score

spec.query:
from(bucket: "AI")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "domain_threats")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "vt_detections")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_value"] > 0)
  |> group(columns: ["domain"])
  |> max()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 10)

spec.title: 🔴 Severity Distribution
spec.description: Breakdown of threats by VT detection severity tier

spec.title: 🎟️ VT API Quota (Today)
spec.description: VirusTotal lookups spent today vs the free 500/day cap

spec.query:
import "date"
from(bucket: "AI")
  |> range(start: date.truncate(t: now(), unit: 1d))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vt_usage" and r._field == "lookup")
  |> sum()

spec.title: 🤝 Feed Agreement
spec.description: Where VirusTotal and AlienVault OTX agree (both / vt_only / otx_only / neither)

spec.query:
from(bucket: "AI")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "domain_threats" and r._field == "vt_detections")
  |> group(columns: ["agreement"])
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> rename(columns: {agreement: "feed"})

spec.title: 🖥️ Top Offending Clients
spec.description: Devices generating the most blocked-domain hits (primary client per domain)

spec.query:
from(bucket: "AI")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "domain_threats" and r._field == "blocked")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value == true)
  |> group(columns: ["client"])
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 10)

from(bucket: "AI")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "domain_threats" and r._field == "blocked")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if r._value then 1 else 0}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: true)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "blocked"}))

spec.title: 🧬 Heuristic Signals
spec.description: Local detections requiring no API budget

spec.query:
from(bucket: "AI")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "domain_threats" and r._field == "dga_suspect")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if r._value then 1 else 0}))
  |> group()
  |> sum()
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "dga_suspect")
  |> keep(columns: ["_value", "_field"])
  |> yield(name: "dga_suspect")

from(bucket: "AI")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "domain_threats" and r._field == "typosquat")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if r._value then 1 else 0}))
  |> group()
  |> sum()
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "typosquat")
  |> keep(columns: ["_value", "_field"])
  |> yield(name: "typosquat")

from(bucket: "AI")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "domain_threats" and r._field == "punycode")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if r._value then 1 else 0}))
  |> group()
  |> sum()
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "punycode")
  |> keep(columns: ["_value", "_field"])
  |> yield(name: "punycode")

from(bucket: "AI")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "domain_threats" and r._field == "newly_registered")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if r._value then 1 else 0}))
  |> group()
  |> sum()
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "newly_registered")
  |> keep(columns: ["_value", "_field"])
  |> yield(name: "newly_registered")

spec.title: 🌍 Geo Threat Map
spec.description: Countries where VirusTotal flagged at least one domain (vt_detections > 0)

spec.query:
from(bucket: "AI")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "domain_threats" and r._field == "vt_detections")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 0)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.country != "unknown" and r.country != "??" and r.country != "")
  |> group(columns: ["country"])
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ countryCode: r.country, _value: r._value }))
